body_excerpt: In icmp_global_allow of icmp.c, there is a possible disclosure of UDP source ports due to a side channel information disclosure. This could lead to remote information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In icmp_global_allow of icmp.c, there is a possible disclosure of UDP source ports due to a side channel information disclosure. This could lead to remote information disclosure with no additional exe
